weather.headline: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A slight chance of rain showers between 11am and noon, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 61, with temperatures falling to around 56 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 3 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
weather.tonight: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
